headlines.title: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DR Congo an international emergency
headlines.summary: The World Health Organization has declared a public health emergency of international concern over a rare strain of Ebola in the Democratic Republic of Congo. Latest update reports 139 suspected deaths and 600 cases.

headlines.title: Putin and Xi hail their friendship and growing energy trade at Beijing meeting
headlines.summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin met with Chinese leader Xi Jinping in Beijing for talks and tea, just days after Trump's visit to the region. The meeting signals strengthening China-Russia ties.

headlines.title: Trump exerts iron grip on Republican Party with Massie defeated in Kentucky
headlines.summary: Victory over a Republican rebel in Kentucky shows the president's strength, but his power comes with risks for the midterms.

headlines.title: Trump endorses Ken Paxton in Texas GOP primary, challenging Sen. Cornyn
headlines.summary: Trump's endorsement of Paxton in the Texas Senate race has dismayed Senate Republicans, many of whom have served with the incumbent Cornyn for decades.

headlines.title: Lithuania's leaders take shelter during drone air alert near Belarus border
headlines.summary: Flights were suspended and people were urged to take shelter after a suspected drone was detected near the Belarus border.

headlines.title: Three killed in San Diego mosque shooting; security guard hailed as hero
headlines.summary: Father-of-eight Amin Abdullah, a security guard, was among three killed in the attack and was described as 'a shining light'. Teenage suspects shared a 'broad hatred' of multiple religions.

headlines.title: More than 17,000 under evacuation orders as Southern California wildfire threatens homes
headlines.summary: The Sandy Fire in Simi Valley, California has forced mass evacuations as it threatens residential areas.

headlines.title: Samsung union announces 48,000-strong strike after bonus impasse
headlines.summary: Samsung union says it will embark on a major strike following failed negotiations over bonuses.

headlines.title: Thailand cuts visa-free stay period for over 90 countries including UK
headlines.summary: Many visitors who have been exempt for 60 days will soon have to apply for a visa after 30 days.

headlines.title: Nigeria arrests former minister in hiding after 75-year corruption conviction
headlines.summary: The former power minister was sentenced in absentia earlier this month and has now been apprehended.
